sentences.text: The purpose is to prevent the collapse of the oropharyngeal walls and the obstruction of airflow during sleep, which occurs in obstructive sleep apnea (OSA).
sentences.label: PREMISE

sentences.text: The apnea hypopnea index (AHI) is equal to the average number of episodes of apnea and hypopnea per hour.
sentences.label: NON_ARGUMENTATIVE

sentences.text: The respiratory disturbance index (RDI) is equal to the average number of respiratory disturbances per hour.
sentences.label: NON_ARGUMENTATIVE

sentences.text: Apnea is defined as a cessation of airflow for at least 10 seconds.
sentences.label: NON_ARGUMENTATIVE

sentences.text: Hypopnea is defined as an abnormal respiratory event lasting at least 10 seconds with at least a 30% reduction in thoracoabdominal movement or airflow as compared to baseline, and with at least a 4% oxygen desaturation.
sentences.label: NON_ARGUMENTATIVE

sentences.text: The AHI and/or RDI may be measured by polysomnography (PSG) in a facility-based sleep study laboratory, or by a Type II home sleep test (HST) monitor, a Type III HST monitor, or a Type IV HST monitor measuring at least 3 channels.
sentences.label: NON_ARGUMENTATIVE

sentences.text: Indications and Limitations of Coverage B. Nationally Covered Indications Effective for claims with dates of service on and after March 13, 2008, the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) determines that CPAP therapy when used in adult patients with OSA is considered reasonable and necessary under the following situations: 1.
sentences.label: CLAIM

sentences.text: The use of CPAP is covered under Medicare when used in adult patients with OSA.
sentences.label: CLAIM

sentences.text: Coverage of CPAP is initially limited to a 12-week period to identify beneficiaries diagnosed with OSA as subsequently described who benefit from CPAP.
sentences.label: CLAIM

sentences.text: CPAP is subsequently covered only for those beneficiaries diagnosed with OSA who benefit from CPAP during this 12-week period. 2.
sentences.label: CLAIM

sentences.text: The provider of CPAP must conduct education of the beneficiary prior to the use of the CPAP device to ensure that the beneficiary has been educated in the proper use of the device.
sentences.label: PREMISE

sentences.text: A caregiver, for example a family member, may be compensatory, if consistently available in the beneficiary's home and willing and able to safely operate the CPAP device. 3.
sentences.label: CLAIM

sentences.text: The sleep test must have been previously ordered by the beneficiary’s treating physician and furnished under appropriate physician supervision. 5.
sentences.label: NON_ARGUMENTATIVE

sentences.text: An initial 12-week period of CPAP is covered in adult patients with OSA if either of the following criterion using the AHI or RDI are met: a. AHI or RDI greater than or equal to 15 events per hour, or b. AHI or RDI greater than or equal to 5 events and less than or equal to 14 events per hour with documented symptoms of excessive daytime sleepiness, impaired cognition, mood disorders or insomnia, or documented hypertension, ischemic heart disease, or history of stroke. 6.
sentences.label: CLAIM

sentences.text: The AHI or RDI is calculated on the average number of events of per hour.
sentences.label: NON_ARGUMENTATIVE

sentences.text: If the AHI or RDI is calculated based on less than 2 hours of continuous recorded sleep, the total number of recorded events to calculate the AHI or RDI during sleep testing must be at a minimum the number of events that would have been required in a 2-hour period. 7.
sentences.label: PREMISE

sentences.text: Coverage with Evidence Development (CED): Medicare provides the following limited coverage for CPAP in adult beneficiaries who do not qualify for CPAP coverage based on criteria 1-7 above.
sentences.label: CLAIM

sentences.text: h. The research study is sponsored by an organization or individual capable of executing the proposed study successfully.
sentences.label: NON_ARGUMENTATIVE

sentences.text: l. The clinical research study is not designed to exclusively test toxicity or disease pathophysiology in healthy individuals.
sentences.label: NON_ARGUMENTATIVE

sentences.text: However, a full report of the outcomes must be made public no later than 3 years after the end of data collection.
sentences.label: NON_ARGUMENTATIVE

Effective for claims with dates of services on and after March 13, 2008, other diagnostic tests for the diagnosis of OSA, other than those noted above for prescribing CPAP, are not sufficient for the coverage of CPAP.
sentences.label: CLAIM

sentences.text: The only change is a clarification to the verbiage under the Policy section of the Business Requirements at I.B.3. All other information remains the same.
sentences.label: NON_ARGUMENTATIVE

sentences.label: CLAIM
